description.value:
Prerequisite: At least three ranks in the Fast Hero class.

Benefit: Character gains two talents from the Fast hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list, and the character must meet all prerequisites: Defensive Talent Tree: Uncanny Dodge 1, Uncanny Dodge 2, Defensive Roll, or Opportunist. Increased Speed Talent Tree: Improved Increased Speed or Advanced Increased Speed.

Special: This feat may be selected multiple times. Each time it is selected, a different pair of talents must be chosen than the previous times.
description.summary: Character gains two talents from the Fast hero's talent trees. The talents must be selected from the following list,…
